/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/Labyrinth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/DFSGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/KruskalGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/BFSFinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/AStarFinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/Visualizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/StatisticsDecorator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/GenerateMazeCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/FindPathCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/ToggleModeCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/ShowStatisticsCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeApp.dir/src/NewMazeCommand.cpp.o -o MazeApp
